title: OrderConfirmed
description: Published when an order has been confirmed and is ready for downstream fulfillment.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the confirmed order.

orderItems.description: Line items included in the confirmed order.

orderStatus.description: Status of the order at confirmation time.

totalAmount.description: Total monetary amount of the confirmed order.

confirmationTimestamp.description: Epoch milliseconds when the order was confirmed.
